title: Section 1
content: 1[(1)] This Act may be called the Destructive Insects and Pests Act, 1914. 2[(2) It extends to the whole of India 3***.]
footnote: 1. Section 1 re-numbered as sub-section (1) thereof by s. 3 and the Schedule, ibid. 2. Ins. by s. 3 and the Schedule, ibid. 33. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 62 of 1956, s. 2 and the Schedule (w.e.f 1-11-1956).
